# Custom Product Pages

**API Collection**

View Custom Product Page details.

## Overview

In iOS 15 and later, you can use [https://developer.apple.com/app-store/product-page/] that you build in [https://appstoreconnect.apple.com] to create ad variations in the Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API to promote your apps.

To create a custom product page ad, use the following workflow:



1. Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Product-Pages] to fetch your `productPageId`.
2. Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Product-Page-Locales] to fetch locale metadata and supported languages. Verify that your custom product page locale and asset data match the language and device types in your campaign [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup].
3. Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Creative] with your `productPageId` to obtain a `creativeId`.
4. Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-an-Ad] with a `creativeId` to assign a custom product page to an [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AdGroup]. Each ad group can have one custom product page. For information about how to update a custom product page ad group assignment, see [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-an-Ad].
5. Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-Ad-Level-Reports] to track the performance of ads in your campaigns. These details help you optimize your Apple Search Ads campaigns to deliver a contextualized customer experience.



## Product Page Endpoints

- **Get Product Pages**: Fetches metadata of all your custom product pages.
- **Get Product Pages by Identifier**: Fetches metadata for a specific product page.
- **Get Product Page Locales**: Fetches product page locales by identifier.
- **Get Supported Countries or Regions**: Fetches supported languages and language codes.
- **Get App Preview Device Sizes**: Fetches supported app preview device-size mappings.

## Product Page Request and Response Objects

- **LocaleInfo**: The supported languages and language codes.
- **CountryOrRegion**: The supported locales of a product page.
- **CountriesOrRegionsListResponse**: A container for product page responses.
- **MediaAppVideoAsset**: The app preview or screenshot asset detail.
- **ProductPageLocaleDetail**: The product page locale metadata on App Store Connect.
- **ProductPageDetail**: The product page metadata.
- **ProductPageDetailWithAssets**: The product page asset metadata.
- **ProductPageLocaleDetailListResponse**: A container for product page responses.
- **ProductPageDetailResponse**: A container for product page responses.
- **ProductPageDetailWithAssetInfoResponse**: A container for product page responses.
- **ProductPageDetailListResponse**: A container for product page responses.
- **ProductPageReasonCreate**: The ad creative rejection reason based on a product page.

## Custom Product Page Ads

- **Ads**: Assign an ad creative to an ad group.
- **Ad Rejection Reasons**: Review reasons for an ad rejection.
- **Creatives**: Create and manage ad creatives within your organization.
